name: Elaine's Kahlua & Cream Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup hard chocolate cookie crumbs, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crust ingredients together and press into a prepared springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 5 minutes, then let cool.
3. For the filling, mix one ingredient at a time with an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Pour the filling into the cooled pie crust.
5. Bake in the oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 55 to 60 minutes.
6. Leave the cake in the oven with the door open for 1 hour after baking.
7. Remove from the oven and refrigerate until cool.
8. Prepare the glaze by ensuring it has a pourable consistency.
9. Spread the glaze over the top of the chilled cake.
10. Refrigerate for an additional 6 hours before serving.
11. Garnish with whipped cream.
